---
title: "metric_calcs"
author: "Shayla Triantafillou"
date: "2026-06-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
###
# this version edited 07022026 by Noël for redoing metrics calcs from ben
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("./data/Metrics/ALL_metrics_07022026.csv")

data_byyr <- read_csv("./data/Metrics/SelectMetricsByYear_07022026.csv")

wood_metrics <- data_byyr %>%
  rename(reach = site,
         site = river) %>% 
  mutate(site_reach = paste0(site,reach),
         wood_pieces_per_100m = (wood_pieces*100)/(channel_length),
         wood_accum_per_area = accum_area/channel_area) %>%
  group_by(site_reach) %>%
  summarize(avg_wood_pieces_per100m = mean(wood_pieces_per_100m),
            mean_wood_accum_per_area = mean(wood_accum_per_area))


```

```{r}
dynamism <- data %>% 
  rename(reach = site,
         site = river) %>% 
  group_by(site, reach) %>%
  summarize(
    #Calculate dynamism metric
      sum_abs_change_sin = sum(abs(sinuosity_change)),
      sum_abs_change_comp = sum(abs(complexity_change)),
      sum_abs_change_sdi = sum(abs(sdi_change)),
      sum_abs_change_net_change = sum(abs(net_change)),
      delta_t = max(year_to) - min(year_from) +1, # +1 makes it inclusive (so 2010-2015 includes 6 years, because each end year represents a year of imagery)
      n_images = n(),
      sinuosity_dynamism = (sum_abs_change_sin)/(delta_t * n_images),
      complexity_dynamism = (sum_abs_change_comp)/(delta_t * n_images),
      sdi_dynamism = (sum_abs_change_sdi)/(delta_t * n_images),
      net_change_dynamism = (sum_abs_change_net_change)/(delta_t * n_images),
      .groups = "drop"

  ) %>%
  mutate(site_reach = paste0(site,reach),
         reach = factor(reach, levels=c("no_LW_Channel","LW_Channel")))

site_metrics <- merge(dynamism, wood_metrics, by = "site_reach") %>%  
  filter(!site_reach == "Rock_WA_2no_LW_Channel")#Remove duplicate Rock WA 2 no LW Channel.

write_csv(site_metrics, "./data/Metrics/site_metrics_07022026.csv")
```
